meta.title: Lankawa — Sri Lanka Civic Intelligence
meta.description: Everything public, for every Sri Lankan. Unified civic data across economy, districts, disasters, and public services.
meta.districtDescription: {name} district in {province} province. Population {population}. Civic data on Lankawa.
meta.provinceDescription: {name} province — {count} districts with aggregated population, area, and election summaries.
meta.electionPresidentialDescription: 2024 presidential election first-preference results for {name} district.
meta.electionParliamentaryDescription: 2024 parliamentary election seat allocation for {name} electoral district.

home.subtitle: Fresh public data across economy, fuel, floods, and districts — with data provenance on every number.

home.disclaimer: Aggregated from public sources. Not an official government publication.

services.comingSoonBody: Colombo, Kandy, and Galle are seeded deeply. Other districts will be added as open-data feeds become available.

about.title: Mission & data sources
about.subtitle: Open civic intelligence for Sri Lanka — aggregated from public sources with provenance on every metric.
about.missionBody: Lankawa unifies public civic data — economy, disasters, districts, and more — into one accessible platform. We believe Sri Lankans should not need to visit dozens of separate websites to understand their country.
about.freshnessBody: Live metrics show a freshness tier based on when the source was last successfully fetched:
about.freshnessFresh: Fresh — fetched within the expected cadence
about.freshnessStale: Stale — older than expected but still available
about.disclaimerBody: Lankawa aggregates data from public and partner APIs. It is not an official government publication. Always verify critical information with primary sources.
about.apiBody: All data is available via a versioned JSON API with OpenAPI documentation.
about.platformBody: All data, documentation, and source attribution live on Lankawa. You never need to leave this platform to explore metrics, understand methodology, or use the public API.

sources.title: Data Sources
sources.subtitle: Every metric on Lankawa traces back to a registered source with freshness and methodology.

developers.title: Developer API
developers.subtitle: Public read-only endpoints for civic data, freshness, and district profiles — all served from Lankawa.
developers.overviewBody: All endpoints are same-origin JSON APIs. No API key is required for read access. Responses include freshness tiers and internal provenance paths.
developers.healthDescription: Freshness tiers and last-checked timestamps for every registered data source.
developers.pulseDescription: Current exchange rates, fuel prices, flood station counts, and related metrics.
developers.districtsDescription: All 25 Sri Lankan districts with population, area, and province metadata.
developers.districtDescription: Single district profile keyed by slug.
developers.openApiDescription: Machine-readable OpenAPI 3.1 document for the public API.
developers.provenanceBody: Every metric references a source ID and an internal provenance path. Use the sources registry to understand methodology and freshness.
developers.openApiBody: View the full OpenAPI specification rendered inside Lankawa, or fetch the raw JSON from the API.
developers.openApiViewerSubtitle: Machine-readable specification for the Lankawa public API.
developers.electionsDescription: National summary and district-level first-preference results with provenance paths.
